title: He Creaks...
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
A very simple pack that replaces the Creaking with Herobrine, or is it that simple?

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/OWFCrCR.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
Herobrine may or may not have an alt ;)

![Herobrine Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/dIfyllw.png)

![socials](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***
[![](https://i.imgur.com/wbtkCOA.png)](discord.gg/kYYmAWQ)
